title: El Wak Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting El Wak, with a Z-Score of +3.43. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heat wave in El Wak is characterized by a high CDD of 11.0 GG and zero HDD, resulting in extreme daytime temperatures. 
 The relative humidity is at 52%, which can exacerbate the heat-related discomfort. 
 The wind speed of 21.8 km/h may provide some relief, but overall conditions remain critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on El Wak immediately.
